content_en:
Abu Hurairah 4 related that the Messenger of Allah 8 said, “The Hour will not come until the Romans descend in Al’ Aamaaq or Badaabiq (Two areas in the lands of Syria, near Haleb). An army from Madeenah, comprising of the best from the people of the earth at that time, will come out to meet them. When they make their lines, the Romans will say, ‘Make way, allowing us to fight those who took our women and children as prisoners (during war).’ The Muslims will say, ‘By Allah, we will not make way for you to go to our brothers.’ They will fight them. One-third (of the Muslims) will Inhazim (this literally means, ‘become vanquished,’ but perhaps here it means that they will flee), and Allah will never forgive them. Onethird will be killed, and they are the best of martyrs with Allah as. One-third will conquer and they will never be put to trial; and they will conquer Constantinople. While they are distributing the spoils of war and while their swords are hanging on olive trees, the Devil will call to them, saying, ‘the Maseeh (Dajjaal) is behind among your families.’ They will leave, but that (statement) is false. When they go to Ash-Sham (Syria and surrounding areas), he (the Dajjaal) will come out. As the Muslims are preparing to fight, they straighten their lines, and then the call for the prayer is made. Next, ‘Eesa Ibn Maryam 3% will descend and lead them in their prayer. When the enemy of Allah (ie. the Dajjaal) sees him, he will melt, like salt dissolves in water. Were ‘Eesa 4&1 to leave him, he would continue to melt until he became destroyed. But Allah #% kills him at the

78 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

hands of ‘Eesa 8%, who shows them the Dajjaal’s blood on his spear.” (Muslim)

Laailaha Mlallah Wallahuakbar (None Has The Right To Be Worshipped But Allah And Allah Is The Greatest) With Strong Determination And Truthful Eemaan Crushes Fortresses And Conquers Cities

Abu Hurairah 4 related that the Messenger of Allah #¢ said, “You have heard of a city, one side of which is on land and one side of which is on the sea?” The Companions said, “Yes, O Messenger of Allah #8.” He #8 said, “The Hour will not come until 70,000 from the children of Ishaaq attack it. When they come to it, they will descend, but they will not fight with weapons and they will not launch arrows. All they will say is, ‘Laailaha illallah wallaahwakbar (None has the right to be worshipped but Allah, and Allah is the Greatest)’, and one of its two sides will fall.” Ath-Thaur said, “The only way I know it is that he said, ‘the one that is on the sea.’ “Then they will say a second time, ‘Laailaha illallaah wallaahuakbar (none has the right to be worshipped but Allah, and Allah is the Greatest).’ And its second side will fall. Then they will say for a third time, ‘Laailaha Mlallah Wallahuakbar (None has the xight to be worshipped but Allah, and Allah is the Greatest), and a way will be made for them; then they will enter it and take its spoils of war. As they are distributing the spoils, a caller will come to them and say, ‘Indeed the Dajjaal has come out; they will leave everything and return.” (Muslim)

Indication Of The Prophets # Towords The Victory Of Muslims Over Rome

‘Abdullah ibn ‘Amr ibn ‘Aoun related from his father from his grandfather that the Messenger of Allah 28 said, “The Hour will not arrive until the least of Muslim Shuyookh becomes leader. O ‘Alee, O ‘Alee, O ‘Alee.” ‘Alee 4s said, “Be my mother and father sacrificed for you, O Messenger of Allah.” He 2% said, “Indeed you will fight the children of the yellow (ones) (i.e. the Romans). And those who will come after you will fight them, until the best of Islam’s adherents, the people of Hijaaz, will go out to them; they are those who do not fear the blame of the blamer when they do something for Allah. They will conquer Constantinople with At-Tasbeeh (ie,

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 79

’Subhaanallah,’ how perfect Allah is!) and with AtTakbeer (ie. ‘Allaahuakbar/ Allah is the Greatest!). They will gain spoils that they had never previously gained, to the degree that they will divide it with shields. One will come and say, ‘Indeed, the Maseeh (Dajjaal) has come out in your lands, but Lo! It is a lie. The one who takes is regretful and the one who leaves (it) is regretful.” (Ibn Maajah)

The Conquering Of Some Islands And Of The Lands Of Rome And Persia; And The Victory Of Their Truth Over The Falsehood Of Ad-Dajjaal

Naafai’ ibn ‘Uyainah a related that the Messenger of Allah its said, “You will attack an Island of the sea and Allah will grant (you) victory over it; next Persia, and Allah will grant (you) victory over it; then you will attack Rome, and Allah will grant (you) victory over it; then you will attack the Dajjaal, and Allah will grant (you) victory over him.” (Muslim)

Some Good Qualities of Romans

The Qurashee importer said in the company of ‘Amr ibn AlAas 4, “t heard the Messenger of Allah #8 say, ‘The Hour will arrive when the Romans will be most among the people.’” ‘Amr said to him, “Watch what you say.” He said, “I am saying what I heard from the Messenger of Allah #@.” ‘Amr ws said, “If you say that, then there are indeed four qualities in them: they are the most judicious of people during a tribulation; the quickest to recover after a calamity; the quickest to attack after having retreated; the best of them to the poor, the orphan, and the weak; and the fifth is nice and beautiful: among people, they are the best in preventing oppression from the kings (or rulers).” (Muslim)

When The Hour Arrives, The Romans Will Be Greatest In Numbers

The Qurashee Mustaurid (importer) said, “I heard the Messenger of Allah #@ say, ‘The Hour ‘will not come until the Romans will be greatest in numbers.” News of this reached ‘Amr ibn Al-‘Aas <é, who said (to the Qurashee Mustaurid), “What are these Ahuadeeth, about which it is mentioned that you say them from the Messenger of Allah 28?” He said, “I said what I heard from the Messenger of

80 Book of The End: Great Trials and ‘Tribulations

Allah #6.” ‘Amr 4 said, “If you said that, then indeed they are the most judicious of people during a trial, the quickest to recover during a calamity, and the best of people to their poor ones and weak ones.” (Muslim)

This indicates that the Romans will accept Islam at the end of times, and perhaps a group of them will be the ones who will conquer Constantinople, for in the previous hadith it is mentioned that 70,000 from the children of Ishaaq will attack it. And the Romans are from the descendents of Al-’Ais ibn Ishaaq ibn Ibraaheem AlKhaleel; some of them are descendents from the uncle of the Children of Israel - Ya’qoob ibn Ishaaq #2. So at the end of times, the Romans will be better than the Children of Israel (from the past). The Dajjaal will be followed by 70,000 Jews from Asbahaan, so they are the helpers of the Dajjaal. The Romans, on the other hand, are praised in this hadith. Perhaps, therefore, they will accept Islam at the hands of Al-Maseeh ibn Maryam 288; and Allah 8# knows best. ‘Amt ibn ‘Aouf related from his father from his grandfather that the Messenger of Allah 3 said, “You will fight the children of the yellow (ones) and after you, those believers from the people of Hijaaz will fight them; then Allah will grant them victory over Constantinople and Rome with A#Tasbeeh (‘Subhaanallah,’ How perfect Allah is!) and At-Takbeer (‘Allahuakbar,’ Allah is the Greatest), and so its fortress will collapse. They (i.e. the Muslims at that time) will gain (from spoils) that which they had never previously gained, to the extent that they will divide it with shields. Then a caller will call out, ‘O people of Islam, Al-Maseeh Ad-Dajjaal is in your lands and among your women and children.’ The people will disperse from the wealth; some of them will take and some of them will abstain from taking — the one who takes regrets and the one who doesn’t take regrets. They will say, ‘Who is this caller?’ And they will not know who he is. They will say, ‘Send an advance party to Eeliyaa (Jerusalem), and if Al-Maseeh has indeed come out, they will come to you with knowledge of him.’ They go and see nothing, seeing only that the people are tranquil. And they (the people who are behind) will say, ‘The caller did not call out except for some significant news... so be determined that we should all go to Eeliyaa. If the Dajjaal has come out, we will fight him until Allah rules between us and him. But if it is otherwise and if you return, it is to your country and kinsfolk that you are returning to.” (Related by

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 81

Ismaa’eel ibn Abee Uwais)

An Indication That Al-Madeenah Al-Munawwarah Will Be Faced With Weakness When Jerusalem Will Be Inhabited (Or Developed)

Mu’aadh ibn Jabal 4 related that the Messenger of Ailah #% said, “The inhabitation (or development) of Jerusalem"! is the ruin of Yathrib (Madeenah); the great massacte (leads to) the conquering of Constantinople; and the conquering of Constantinople (leads to) the coming out of the Dajjaal.” He 3% then struck his hand on his thigh..or his shoulder, after which he i said, “Indeed, this is surely the truth, just as you are here or just as you are sitting down.” (Ahmad) Abu Daawood related it from ‘Abbaas Al-Anbaree from Abu An-Nadr Haashim ibn Al-Qaasim. Abu Daawood then said, “This chain is good and the hadith is Hasan; upon it is the light of truthfulness and the dignity of Prophethood.” This narration does not signify that Al-Madeenah will be completely ruined when the Dajjaal comes out; it is referring to the end of times, which we will clarify later on through authentic Ahaadeeth. It is the inhabitation and development of Jerusalem that will be the reason for the ruin of Al-Madeenah Al-Munawwarah. In authentic Ahandeeth it is established that the Dajjaal will not be able to enter Al-Madeenah because of Angels that are standing at its gates with swords unsheathed.

Al-Madeenah Al-Munawwarah Is Protected From Plague And From The Dajjaal Entering It

Abu Hurairah # related that the Messenger of Allah #% said, “Neither plague nor the Dajjaal will enter Al-Madeenah.” (Bukhaaree) It is mentioned in Jaamai’ At-Tirmidhee that when AlMaseeh ‘Eesa ibn Maryam 3% dies, he will be buried in the Prophet's chamber.
content_id:
Abu Hurairah # meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah #% bersabda, "Hari Kiamat tidak akan datang hingga kaum Romawi turun di Al-'Aamaaq atau Badaabiq (Dua daerah di tanah Suriah, dekat Haleb). Sebuah pasukan dari Madeenah, yang terdiri dari orang-orang terbaik di muka bumi pada saat itu, akan keluar untuk menemui mereka. Ketika mereka membuat barisan, kaum Romawi akan berkata, 'Beri jalan, biarkan kami memerangi mereka yang mengambil wanita-wanita dan anak-anak kami sebagai tawanan (dalam perang).' Kaum Muslimin akan berkata, 'Demi Allah, kami tidak akan memberi jalan bagi kalian untuk pergi kepada saudara-saudara kami.' Mereka akan memerangi mereka. Sepertiga (dari kaum Muslimin) akan Inhazim (ini secara harfiah berarti 'menjadi kalah,' tetapi mungkin di sini berarti mereka akan melarikan diri), dan Allah tidak akan pernah mengampuni mereka. Sepertiga akan terbunuh, dan mereka adalah syuhada terbaik di sisi Allah #. Sepertiga akan menang dan mereka tidak akan pernah ditimpa cobaan; dan mereka akan menaklukkan Konstantinopel. Ketika mereka sedang membagi rampasan perang dan ketika pedang-pedang mereka tergantung di pohon-pohon zaitun, Syaitan akan berseru kepada mereka, mengatakan, 'Al-Maseeh (Dajjal) berada di belakang di antara keluarga-keluarga kalian.' Mereka akan pergi, tetapi itu (pernyataan) adalah palsu. Ketika mereka pergi ke Syam (Suriah dan sekitarnya), ia (Dajjal) akan keluar. Ketika kaum Muslimin sedang mempersiapkan diri untuk berperang, mereka meluruskan barisan mereka, dan kemudian azan dikumandangkan. Selanjutnya, 'Isa Ibn Maryam #% akan turun dan mengimami mereka dalam shalat. Ketika musuh Allah (yaitu Dajjal) melihatnya, ia akan meleleh, seperti garam yang larut dalam air. Seandainya 'Isa #& membiarkannya, ia akan terus meleleh hingga ia binasa. Tetapi Allah #% membunuhnya di

78 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar

tangan 'Isa #%, yang menunjukkan kepada mereka darah Dajjal di tombaknya." (Muslim)

Laa ilaaha illallaah Wallaahu Akbar (Tidak Ada yang Berhak Disembah Kecuali Allah dan Allah Maha Besar) dengan Tekad yang Kuat dan Iman yang Tulus Menghancurkan Benteng-Benteng dan Menaklukkan Kota-Kota

Abu Hurairah # meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah #¢ bersabda, "Pernahkah kalian mendengar tentang sebuah kota, salah satu sisinya berada di daratan dan salah satu sisinya berada di laut?" Para sahabat berkata, "Ya, wahai Rasulullah #8." Beliau #8 berkata, "Hari Kiamat tidak akan datang hingga 70.000 dari anak-anak Ishaq menyerangnya. Ketika mereka datang kepadanya, mereka akan turun, tetapi mereka tidak akan berperang dengan senjata dan mereka tidak akan meluncurkan anak panah. Yang mereka katakan hanyalah, 'Laa ilaaha illallaah wallaahuakbar (Tidak ada yang berhak disembah kecuali Allah, dan Allah Maha Besar),' dan salah satu dari dua sisinya akan runtuh." Ats-Tsaur berkata, "Satu-satunya cara aku mengetahuinya adalah bahwa beliau berkata, 'yang ada di laut.'" "Kemudian mereka akan berkata untuk kedua kalinya, 'Laa ilaaha illallaah wallaahuakbar (tidak ada yang berhak disembah kecuali Allah, dan Allah Maha Besar).' Dan sisi keduanya akan runtuh. Kemudian mereka akan berkata untuk ketiga kalinya, 'Laa ilaaha illallaah Wallaahu Akbar (Tidak ada yang berhak disembah kecuali Allah, dan Allah Maha Besar),' dan sebuah jalan akan dibukakan bagi mereka; kemudian mereka akan memasukinya dan mengambil rampasan perangnya. Ketika mereka sedang membagi rampasan, seorang penyeru akan datang kepada mereka dan berkata, 'Sesungguhnya Dajjal telah keluar; mereka akan meninggalkan segalanya dan kembali.'" (Muslim)

Isyarat Nabi # tentang Kemenangan Kaum Muslimin atas Roma

'Abdullah ibn 'Amr ibn 'Aun meriwayatkan dari ayahnya dari kakeknya bahwa Rasulullah #8 bersabda, "Hari Kiamat tidak akan tiba hingga yang paling lemah dari para tetua Muslim menjadi pemimpin. Wahai 'Alee, Wahai 'Alee, Wahai 'Alee." 'Alee # berkata, "Ayah dan ibuku sebagai tebusanmu, wahai Rasulullah." Beliau #% berkata, "Sesungguhnya kalian akan memerangi anak-anak orang kuning (yaitu kaum Romawi). Dan mereka yang akan datang setelah kalian akan memerangi mereka, hingga orang-orang terbaik dari penganut Islam, penduduk Hijaz, akan pergi menghadapi mereka; mereka adalah orang-orang yang tidak takut celaan orang yang mencela ketika mereka melakukan sesuatu untuk Allah. Mereka akan menaklukkan Konstantinopel dengan At-Tasbih (yaitu

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar 79

'Subhaanallah,' Maha Suci Allah!) dan dengan At-Takbir (yaitu 'Allaahu Akbar, Allah Maha Besar!'). Mereka akan mendapatkan rampasan yang sebelumnya belum pernah mereka dapatkan, hingga mereka membaginya dengan perisai-perisai. Seseorang akan datang dan berkata, 'Sesungguhnya, Al-Maseeh (Dajjal) telah keluar di tanah-tanah kalian, tetapi Ketahuilah! Itu adalah kebohongan. Orang yang mengambil menyesal dan orang yang meninggalkan (nya) menyesal.'" (Ibn Maajah)

Penaklukan Beberapa Pulau dan Tanah-Tanah Roma dan Persia; dan Kemenangan Kebenaran Mereka atas Kebatilan Ad-Dajjal

Naafai' ibn 'Uyainah # meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah #% bersabda, "Kalian akan menyerang sebuah pulau di laut dan Allah akan menganugerahkan (kalian) kemenangan atasnya; kemudian Persia, dan Allah akan menganugerahkan (kalian) kemenangan atasnya; kemudian kalian akan menyerang Roma, dan Allah akan menganugerahkan (kalian) kemenangan atasnya; kemudian kalian akan menyerang Dajjal, dan Allah akan menganugerahkan (kalian) kemenangan atasnya." (Muslim)

Beberapa Kebaikan Kaum Romawi

Pedagang dari Quraish berkata di hadapan 'Amr ibn Al-'Aas #, "Aku mendengar Rasulullah #8 berkata, 'Hari Kiamat akan tiba ketika kaum Romawi akan menjadi yang terbanyak di antara manusia.'" 'Amr berkata kepadanya, "Perhatikan apa yang kamu katakan." Ia berkata, "Aku mengatakan apa yang aku dengar dari Rasulullah #@." 'Amr # berkata, "Jika kamu mengatakan itu, maka sesungguhnya ada empat kualitas pada mereka: mereka adalah orang-orang yang paling bijaksana ketika mendapat cobaan; yang paling cepat pulih setelah musibah; yang paling cepat menyerang setelah mundur; yang terbaik dari mereka kepada orang miskin, anak yatim, dan orang lemah; dan yang kelima adalah baik dan indah: di antara manusia, mereka adalah yang terbaik dalam mencegah kezaliman dari para raja (atau penguasa)." (Muslim)

Ketika Hari Kiamat Tiba, Kaum Romawi Akan Menjadi yang Terbesar Jumlahnya

Mustaurid (pedagang) dari Quraish berkata, "Aku mendengar Rasulullah #@ berkata, 'Hari Kiamat tidak akan datang hingga kaum Romawi menjadi yang terbesar jumlahnya.'" Berita ini sampai kepada 'Amr ibn Al-'Aas #, yang berkata (kepada Mustaurid dari Quraish), "Apa hadith-hadith ini, yang disebutkan bahwa kamu mengatakannya dari Rasulullah #8?" Ia berkata, "Aku mengatakan apa yang aku dengar dari Rasulullah

80 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar

Allah #%." 'Amr # berkata, "Jika kamu mengatakan itu, maka sesungguhnya mereka adalah orang-orang yang paling bijaksana ketika dalam cobaan, yang paling cepat pulih ketika dalam musibah, dan yang terbaik dari manusia kepada orang-orang miskin dan lemah di antara mereka." (Muslim)

Ini menunjukkan bahwa kaum Romawi akan menerima Islam di akhir zaman, dan mungkin sekelompok dari mereka adalah orang-orang yang akan menaklukkan Konstantinopel, karena dalam hadith sebelumnya disebutkan bahwa 70.000 dari anak-anak Ishaq akan menyerangnya. Dan kaum Romawi adalah dari keturunan Al-'Ais ibn Ishaq ibn Ibrahim Al-Khaleel; sebagian dari mereka adalah keturunan dari paman Bani Israel — Ya'qub ibn Ishaq #%. Jadi di akhir zaman, kaum Romawi akan lebih baik daripada Bani Israel (di masa lalu). Dajjal akan diikuti oleh 70.000 orang Yahudi dari Asbahaan, jadi mereka adalah pembantu-pembantu Dajjal. Kaum Romawi, di sisi lain, dipuji dalam hadith ini. Mungkin, oleh karena itu, mereka akan menerima Islam di tangan Al-Maseeh ibn Maryam #8; dan Allah #% Maha Mengetahui. 'Amr ibn 'Auf meriwayatkan dari ayahnya dari kakeknya bahwa Rasulullah # bersabda, "Kalian akan memerangi anak-anak orang kuning dan setelah kalian, orang-orang yang beriman dari penduduk Hijaz akan memerangi mereka; kemudian Allah akan menganugerahkan mereka kemenangan atas Konstantinopel dan Roma dengan At-Tasbih ('Subhaanallah,' Maha Suci Allah!) dan At-Takbir ('Allaahu Akbar,' Allah Maha Besar!), dan sehingga bentengnya akan runtuh. Mereka (yaitu kaum Muslimin saat itu) akan mendapatkan (dari rampasan) apa yang sebelumnya belum pernah mereka dapatkan, hingga mereka membaginya dengan perisai. Kemudian seorang penyeru akan berseru, 'Wahai penduduk Islam, Al-Maseeh Ad-Dajjal ada di tanah-tanah kalian dan di antara wanita-wanita dan anak-anak kalian.' Orang-orang akan berpencar dari harta; sebagian dari mereka akan mengambil dan sebagian akan menahan diri dari mengambil — orang yang mengambil menyesal dan orang yang tidak mengambil menyesal. Mereka akan berkata, 'Siapakah penyeru ini?' Dan mereka tidak akan tahu siapa dia. Mereka akan berkata, 'Kirimkanlah pasukan ke Eeliyaa (Yerusalem), dan jika Al-Maseeh memang telah keluar, mereka akan datang kepada kalian dengan pengetahuan tentangnya.' Mereka pergi dan tidak melihat apa-apa, hanya melihat bahwa orang-orang dalam keadaan tenang. Dan mereka (orang-orang yang berada di belakang) akan berkata, 'Penyeru itu tidak berseru kecuali untuk suatu berita penting... maka bertekatlah bahwa kita semua harus pergi ke Eeliyaa. Jika Dajjal memang telah keluar, kita akan memeranginya hingga Allah menghakimi antara kita dan dia. Tetapi jika tidak demikian dan jika kalian kembali, maka ke negeri dan keluarga kalianlah kalian kembali.'" (Diriwayatkan oleh

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar 81

Ismaa'eel ibn Abee Uwais)

Isyarat bahwa Al-Madeenah Al-Munawwarah Akan Menghadapi Kelemahan Ketika Yerusalem Dihuni (atau Dikembangkan)

Mu'aadh ibn Jabal # meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah #% bersabda, "Pemakmuran (atau pengembangan) Yerusalem adalah kehancuran Yatsrib (Madeenah); pembantaian besar (mengarah kepada) penaklukan Konstantinopel; dan penaklukan Konstantinopel (mengarah kepada) keluarnya Dajjal." Beliau #% kemudian memukul tangannya di pahanya...atau bahunya, setelah itu beliau # berkata, "Sesungguhnya ini pasti benar, sebagaimana kalian ada di sini atau sebagaimana kalian duduk." (Ahmad) Abu Daawood meriwayatkannya dari 'Abbas Al-Anbaree dari Abu An-Nadr Haashim ibn Al-Qaasim. Abu Daawood kemudian berkata, "Sanad ini baik dan hadithnya Hasan; di atasnya terdapat cahaya kebenaran dan kemuliaan kenabian." Riwayat ini tidak menandakan bahwa Al-Madeenah akan hancur sepenuhnya ketika Dajjal keluar; ia mengacu pada akhir zaman, yang akan kami jelaskan kemudian melalui Ahadits yang sahih. Pemalmuran dan pengembangan Yerusalem itulah yang akan menjadi alasan kehancuran Al-Madeenah Al-Munawwarah. Dalam Ahadits sahih ditetapkan bahwa Dajjal tidak akan mampu memasuki Al-Madeenah karena adanya malaikat-malaikat yang berdiri di gerbang-gerbangnya dengan pedang-pedang terhunus.

Al-Madeenah Al-Munawwarah Terlindungi dari Penyakit Menular dan dari Dajjal yang Memasukinya

Abu Hurairah # meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah #% bersabda, "Tidak penyakit menular maupun Dajjal akan memasuki Al-Madeenah." (Bukhaaree) Disebutkan dalam Jaami' At-Tirmidhee bahwa ketika Al-Maseeh 'Isa ibn Maryam #% wafat, ia akan dikuburkan di ruangan (kamar) Nabi #%.
content_ar: أبو هريرة 4 related that الرسول ﷺ of الله 8 said, “The Hour will not come حتى the Romans descend in Al’ Aamaaq or Badaabiq (Two areas in the lands of Syria, near Haleb). An army from Madeenah, comprising of the best from the people of the earth at that time, will come out to meet them. عندما they make their lines, the Romans will say, ‘Make الطريق, allowing us to fight those who took our women and الأولاد as prisoners (خلال war).’ The المسلمون will say, ‘By الله, we will not make الطريق for you to go to our brothers.’ They will fight them. One-ثالثاً (of the المسلمون) will Inhazim (this literally means, ‘become vanquished,’ but perhaps here it means that they will flee), and الله will never forgive them. Onethird will be killed, and they are the best of martyrs with الله as. One-ثالثاً will conquer and they will never be put to الابتلاء; and they will conquer Constantinople. بينما they are distributing the spoils of war and بينما their swords are hanging on olive trees, the الشيطان will call to them, saying, ‘the Maseeh (Dajjaal) is behind among your families.’ They will leave, but that (statement) is false. عندما they go to Ash-Sham (Syria and surrounding areas), he (the Dajjaal) will come out. As the المسلمون are preparing to fight, they straighten their lines, and then the call for the الصلاة is made. Next, ‘Eesa Ibn Maryam 3% will descend and lead them in their الصلاة. عندما the enemy of الله (ie. the Dajjaal) sees him, he will melt, like salt dissolves in water. Were ‘Eesa 4&1 to leave him, he would continue to melt حتى he became destroyed. But الله #% kills him at the 78 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations hands of ‘Eesa 8%, who shows them the Dajjaal’s blood on his spear.” (مسلم) Laailaha Mlallah Wallahuakbar (None Has The الحق To Be Worshipped But الله And الله Is The Greatest) With Strong Determination And Truthful Eemaan Crushes Fortresses And Conquers Cities أبو هريرة 4 related that الرسول ﷺ of الله #¢ said, “You have heard of a city, one side of which is on land and one side of which is on the sea?” The الصحابة said, “Yes, O Messenger of الله #8.” He #8 said, “The Hour will not come حتى 70,000 from the الأولاد of Ishaaq attack it. عندما they come to it, they will descend, but they will not fight with weapons and they will not launch arrows. All they will say is, ‘Laailaha illallah wallaahwakbar (None has the الحق to be worshipped but الله, and الله is the Greatest)’, and one of its two sides will fall.” Ath-Thaur said, “The only الطريق I know it is that قال, ‘the one that is on the sea.’ “Then they will say a ثانياً time, ‘Laailaha illallaah wallaahuakbar (none has the الحق to be worshipped but الله, and الله is the Greatest).’ And its ثانياً side will fall. Then they will say for a ثالثاً time, ‘Laailaha Mlallah Wallahuakbar (None has the xight to be worshipped but الله, and الله is the Greatest), and a الطريق will be made for them; then they will enter it and take its spoils of war. As they are distributing the spoils, a caller will come to them and say, ‘Indeed the Dajjaal has come out; they will leave everything and return.” (مسلم) Indication Of The الأنبياء # Towords The Victory Of المسلمون Over Rome ‘Abdullah ibn ‘Amr ibn ‘Aoun related from his الأب from his grandfather that الرسول ﷺ of الله 28 said, “The Hour will not arrive حتى the least of مسلم Shuyookh becomes leader. O ‘Alee, O ‘Alee, O ‘Alee.” ‘Alee 4s said, “Be my الأم and الأب sacrificed for you, O Messenger of الله.” He 2% said, “Indeed you will fight the الأولاد of the yellow (ones) (i.e. the Romans). And those who will come بعد you will fight them, حتى the best of الإسلام’s adherents, the people of Hijaaz, will go out to them; they are those who do not الخوف the blame of the blamer عندما they do something for الله. They will conquer Constantinople with At-Tasbeeh (ie, الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 79 ’Subhaanallah,’ how perfect الله is!) and with AtTakbeer (ie. ‘Allaahuakbar/ الله is the Greatest!). They will gain spoils that they had never previously gained, to the degree that they will divide it with shields. One will come and say, ‘Indeed, the Maseeh (Dajjaal) has come out in your lands, but Lo! It is a lie. The one who takes is regretful and the one who leaves (it) is regretful.” (Ibn Maajah) The Conquering Of Some Islands And Of The Lands Of Rome And Persia; And The Victory Of Their الحق Over The الباطل Of Ad-Dajjaal Naafai’ ibn ‘Uyainah a related that الرسول ﷺ of الله its said, “You will attack an Island of the sea and الله will grant (you) victory over it; next Persia, and الله will grant (you) victory over it; then you will attack Rome, and الله will grant (you) victory over it; then you will attack the Dajjaal, and الله will grant (you) victory over him.” (مسلم) Some الخير Qualities of Romans The Qurashee importer said in the company of ‘Amr ibn AlAas 4, “t heard الرسول ﷺ of الله #8 say, ‘The Hour will arrive عندما the Romans will be most among the people.’” ‘Amr said to him, “Watch what you say.” قال, “I am saying what I heard from الرسول ﷺ of الله #@.” ‘Amr ws said, “إذا you say that, then there are indeed four qualities in them: they are the most judicious of people خلال a المحنة; the quickest to recover بعد a calamity; the quickest to attack بعد having retreated; the best of them to the poor, the orphan, and the weak; and the خامساً is nice and beautiful: among people, they are the best in preventing oppression from the kings (or rulers).” (مسلم) عندما The Hour Arrives, The Romans Will Be Greatest In Numbers The Qurashee Mustaurid (importer) said, “I heard الرسول ﷺ of الله #@ say, ‘The Hour ‘will not come حتى the Romans will be greatest in numbers.” News of this reached ‘Amr ibn Al-‘Aas <é, who said (to the Qurashee Mustaurid), “What are these Ahuadeeth, about which ورد that you say them from الرسول ﷺ of الله 28?” قال, “I said what I heard from الرسول ﷺ of 80 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and ‘Tribulations الله #6.” ‘Amr 4 said, “إذا you said that, then indeed they are the most judicious of people خلال a الابتلاء, the quickest to recover خلال a calamity, and the best of people to their poor ones and weak ones.” (مسلم) This indicates that the Romans will accept الإسلام at the end of times, and perhaps a group of them will be the ones who will conquer Constantinople, for in the previous الحديث ورد that 70,000 from the الأولاد of Ishaaq will attack it. And the Romans are from the descendents of Al-’Ais ibn Ishaaq ibn Ibraaheem AlKhaleel; some of them are descendents from the uncle of the الأولاد of Israel - Ya’qoob ibn Ishaaq #2. لذا at the end of times, the Romans will be better than the الأولاد of Israel (from the past). The Dajjaal will be followed by 70,000 Jews from Asbahaan, لذا they are the helpers of the Dajjaal. The Romans, من ناحية أخرى, are praised in this الحديث. Perhaps, لذلك, they will accept الإسلام at the hands of Al-Maseeh ibn Maryam 288; and الله 8# knows best. ‘Amt ibn ‘Aouf related from his الأب from his grandfather that الرسول ﷺ of الله 3 said, “You will fight the الأولاد of the yellow (ones) and بعد you, those المؤمنون from the people of Hijaaz will fight them; then الله will grant them victory over Constantinople and Rome with A#Tasbeeh (‘Subhaanallah,’ How perfect الله is!) and At-Takbeer (‘Allahuakbar,’ الله is the Greatest), and لذا its fortress will collapse. They (i.e. the المسلمون at that time) will gain (from spoils) that which they had never previously gained, to the extent that they will divide it with shields. Then a caller will call out, ‘O people of الإسلام, Al-Maseeh Ad-Dajjaal is in your lands and among your women and الأولاد.’ The people will disperse from the الثروة; some of them will take and some of them will abstain from taking — the one who takes regrets and the one who doesn’t take regrets. They will say, ‘Who is this caller?’ And they will not know who he is. They will say, ‘Send an advance party to Eeliyaa (Jerusalem), and إذا Al-Maseeh has indeed come out, they will come to you with العلم of him.’ They go and see nothing, seeing only that the people are tranquil. And they (the people who are behind) will say, ‘The caller did not call out except for some المهم news... لذا be determined that ينبغي لنا all go to Eeliyaa. إذا the Dajjaal has come out, we will fight him حتى الله rules between us and him. But إذا it is otherwise and إذا you return, it is to your country and kinsfolk that you are returning to.” (Related by الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 81 Ismaa’eel ibn Abee Uwais) An Indication That Al-Madeenah Al-Munawwarah Will Be Faced With الضعف عندما Jerusalem Will Be Inhabited (Or Developed) Mu’aadh ibn Jabal 4 related that الرسول ﷺ of Ailah #% said, “The inhabitation (or development) of Jerusalem"! is the ruin of Yathrib (Madeenah); the great massacte (leads to) the conquering of Constantinople; and the conquering of Constantinople (leads to) the coming out of the Dajjaal.” He 3% then struck his hand on his thigh..or his shoulder, بعد which he i said, “Indeed, this is surely the الحق, just as you are here or just as you are sitting down.” (أحمد) Abu Daawood related it from ‘Abbaas Al-Anbaree from Abu An-Nadr Haashim ibn Al-Qaasim. Abu Daawood then said, “This chain is الخير and the الحديث is حسن; upon it is the light of truthfulness and the الكرامة of Prophethood.” This narration does not signify that Al-Madeenah will be completely ruined عندما the Dajjaal comes out; it is referring to the end of times, which we will clarify later on through authentic Ahaadeeth. It is the inhabitation and development of Jerusalem that will be the العقل for the ruin of Al-Madeenah Al-Munawwarah. In authentic Ahandeeth ثبت that the Dajjaal will not be able to enter Al-Madeenah لأن of الملائكة that are standing at its gates with swords unsheathed. Al-Madeenah Al-Munawwarah Is Protected From Plague And From The Dajjaal Entering It أبو هريرة # related that الرسول ﷺ of الله #% said, “Neither plague nor the Dajjaal will enter Al-Madeenah.” (Bukhaaree) ورد in Jaamai’ At-Tirmidhee that عندما AlMaseeh ‘Eesa ibn Maryam 3% dies, he will be buried in النبي ﷺ's chamber.
